{"id":"project-LICHEN-ziom","title":"Missing NULL check in lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/messages.c:176-186

Unlike other init functions in the RPL module, `lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init` does not check for NULL input:

```c
void lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init(struct lichen_rpl_dodag_config *cfg)
{
    cfg->min_hop_rank_increase = 256;  // Crashes if cfg is NULL
    ...
}
```

For consistency with other init functions (lichen_rpl_dodag_init, lichen_trickle_init, etc.) which all check for NULL, this function should also validate its input.

Impact: NULL dereference crash if caller passes NULL.

Fix: Add `if (cfg == NULL) { return; }` at function start.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:53:15.563337Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:53:15.563383Z"}

{

For consistency with other init functions (lichen_rpl_dodag_init, lichen_trickle_init, etc.) which all check for NULL, this function should also validate its input.

Impact: NULL dereference crash if caller passes NULL.

Fix: Add `if (cfg == NULL) { return; }` at function start.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:53:15.563337Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:52.305504796Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:52.305504796Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:26:52.305504796Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:21:52.305504796Z"}

new_value: Added NULL check to lichen_rpl_dodag_config_init for consistency with other RPL init functions; already present in current code at messages.c:249
